boundary: Static local assumptions only; no live data, broker API, orders, predictions, portfolio optimization, tax/legal/investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendations.
human_verification_items: Confirm holdings and allocation sum against the source ledger.
Confirm expense ratios and cash-like classifications from approved source material.
Confirm gross return, cash return, turnover, realized gain, tax rate, taxable allocation, rebalance, and contribution timing assumptions.
Confirm audit artifacts are current for the artifacts being reviewed.
Confirm the next review date is supplied by a human reviewer.

research_note_prompts.name: assumptions_changed
research_note_prompts.prompt: Draft a research-note section named Assumptions Changed. Use only the local packet and gallery artifacts. Compare the packet assumptions against the gallery cases and identify which assumption fields would need a human reviewer to mark as changed. Do not infer live market conditions or make tax, legal, investment, or buy/sell/hold recommendations.

research_note_prompts.name: human_verification
research_note_prompts.prompt: Draft a research-note section named Human Verification Needed. List the inputs a human must verify before sharing: holdings, allocation sum, expense ratios, cash return, gross return, turnover, realized gain, tax rate, taxable allocation, rebalance frequency, contribution timing, and audit statuses. Use public-safe wording and do not imply that the arithmetic is personalized advice.

research_note_prompts.name: no_advice_boundary
research_note_prompts.prompt: Draft a research-note boundary paragraph using this exact boundary: Static local assumptions only; no live data, broker API, orders, predictions, portfolio optimization, tax/legal/investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendations. State that the note is a deterministic local scenario review and not tax, legal, investment, or buy/sell/hold advice.

research_note_prompts.name: next_review_date
research_note_prompts.prompt: Add a Next Review Date field in YYYY-MM-DD format for a human reviewer to fill in. Leave the value blank unless a human supplies the date.
